title: The Value Within Podcast By Sean Michael Coaching
description:
In this powerful moment, Freeman Fung urges us to shift from reacting to the world to proactively expanding our global mindset.

If you're a coach or creative thinker, this is your reminder to stop letting the world lead your life and start thinking bigger.

title: Global Citizen Life Podcast with Sally Pederson
description:
Join us as we explore the pathways to becoming a global citizen, offering expert guidance and real-life experiences to inspire and equip you to make the world your home. 
Whether you're looking to expand your horizons, protect your assets, or simply live a life of freedom and adventure, Global Citizen Life is your compass to navigating the complexities of a global lifestyle.

title: Reclaim Your Life Podcast with Irina Shehovsov
description: In this episode, international speaker and best-selling author Freeman Fung shares his incredible journey from a high-flying career to personal breakdown and healing.

title: Spiritual Changemakers Podcast with Andreea Tamas
description: Join us in this captivating episode of the "Spiritual Changemakers" podcast as we travel through the globe with Freeman Fung, exploring the transformative power of travel on personal and spiritual growth.

title: Design Her Travel Podcast with Kim Anderson
description:
Do you feel most alive when exploring new parts of the world? Do you want to travel more and connect with like minded individuals and live the life of your dreams? 
If so, you've come to the right place! Hosted by global nomad, Kim Anderson, Design Her Travel inspires you to live the life of your dreams and incorporate more travel in your daily life.

title: Energy Medicine Podcast with Dr. Mary Sanders
description: A special collaborative episode where three experts in the fields of psychiatry, hypnosis, and performance mindset converge to offer a wealth of wisdom on the topic of embodiment and activating all parts of the brain.

title: Unthethered Your Life Podcast with Nikhil Torsekar
description: Welcome to Untether Your Life, a show that empowers you to own your own health and break free of templates for managing physical and mental wellness, and looks at key issues impacting the South Asian diaspora.

title: An Honest Look Podcast with Fatí and Rick
description: This week we’ll embark on a transformative journey as we transcend borders and embrace the spirit of a global citizen. Prepare yourself for an extraordinary voyage of self-discovery that will reshape your perception of the world as Fatí, Rick and their guest Freeman Fung embark on a captivating tale of travel.

title: The Untold Story Told Pocast with Saliha Wazirzada
description: In this episode of The Untold Story Told podcast, I had the absolute joy to join Spiritual Life Coach & Podcast Host Saliha Wazirzada for an empowering conversation.

title: Energy Medicine Podcast with Dr. Mary Sanders
description: Join Dr. Mary, a chiropractor and medical intuitive, as she interviews world renowned practitioners and unveils various techniques that will empower you to take back control of your life. Each episode will contain transformational tools for you to up-level your personal frequency and live a vibrant life!

title: Lorraine Nilon's Insight and Awareness - Spiritual Explorer Podcast
description: Join Lorraine Nilon - Soul Intuitive®, Emotional and Spiritual Mentor and Award-Winning Author, as she engages with people from all walks of life to ask the question - What do we need to acknowledge to live a more authentic life? What does humanity need to acknowledge and understand for evolution to occur?

title: Fearless & Successful Podcast with Dijana Llugolli
description: The Fearless and Successful Podcast is hosted by Coach D, designed for changemakers just like you. As a coach, Activator of Human potential and Freedom architect Dijana has one mission with this podcast: to inspire you to Dream Big, Plan for Success and Impact the World.

title: My Best Healer Podcast with Dr. Moghazy
description: A true believer in the power of the mind, with a heart inspired by cultural diversity and inclusion, Freeman Fung is on a mission to awaken more world citizens and make our world a better place through personal transformations.

title: The Abundance & Success Codes’ Summit
description: The Abundance & Success Codes’ Summit is a revolutionary space dedicated to you and your evolution.⁠

title: Tuesday Talks with Zishan
description: In this Tuesday Talks interview, I share with host Zishan my journey of being global citizen, why I wrote Travel to Transform, biohacking in today’s world, and much more…

title: Author Hour Podcast
description:
In this episode, I talk to host Hussein Al-Baiaty, about my new book and we discussed how anyone can receive benefits in their day-to-day by simply adopting a "Global Citizen" mindset.
Give it a listen how I’ve used travel as a self-growth and development path that has opened new doors both personally and professionally. And more importantly—how you can too!
